members.name: Function
members.summary: A function to be applied to the scalar.

values.name: FUNC_ABS
values.summary: Returns the absolute value of the parameter. Translates to [code]abs(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_ACOS
values.summary: Returns the arc-cosine of the parameter. Translates to [code]acos(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_ACOSH
values.summary: Returns the arc-hyperbolic-cosine of the parameter. Translates to [code]acosh(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_ASIN
values.summary: Returns the arc-sine of the parameter. Translates to [code]asin(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_ASINH
values.summary: Returns the arc-hyperbolic-sine of the parameter. Translates to [code]asinh(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_ATAN
values.summary: Returns the arc-tangent of the parameter. Translates to [code]atan(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_ATANH
values.summary: Returns the arc-hyperbolic-tangent of the parameter. Translates to [code]atanh(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_CEIL
values.summary: Finds the nearest integer that is greater than or equal to the parameter. Translates to [code]ceil(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_COS
values.summary: Returns the cosine of the parameter. Translates to [code]cos(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_COSH
values.summary: Returns the hyperbolic cosine of the parameter. Translates to [code]cosh(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_DEGREES
values.summary: Convert a quantity in radians to degrees. Translates to [code]degrees(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_EXP
values.summary: Returns the natural exponentiation of the parameter. Translates to [code]exp(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_EXP2
values.summary: Returns 2 raised by the power of the parameter. Translates to [code]exp2(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_FLOOR
values.summary: Finds the nearest integer less than or equal to the parameter. Translates to [code]floor(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_FRACT
values.summary: Computes the fractional part of the argument. Translates to [code]fract(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_INVERSE_SQRT
values.summary: Returns the inverse of the square root of the parameter. Translates to [code]inversesqrt(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_LOG
values.summary: Returns the natural logarithm of the parameter. Translates to [code]log(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_LOG2
values.summary: Returns the base 2 logarithm of the parameter. Translates to [code]log2(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Function] enum.

values.name: FUNC_NEGATE
values.summary: Negates the [code]x[/code] using [code]-(x)[/code].

values.name: FUNC_ONEMINUS
values.summary: Subtracts scalar [code]x[/code] from 1 (i.e. [code]1 - x[/code]).

values.name: FUNC_RADIANS
values.summary: Convert a quantity in degrees to radians. Translates to [code]radians(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_RECIPROCAL
values.summary: Finds reciprocal value of dividing 1 by [code]x[/code] (i.e. [code]1 / x[/code]).

values.name: FUNC_ROUND
values.summary: Finds the nearest integer to the parameter. Translates to [code]round(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_ROUNDEVEN
values.summary: Finds the nearest even integer to the parameter. Translates to [code]roundEven(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_SATURATE
values.summary: Clamps the value between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code] using [code]min(max(x, 0.0), 1.0)[/code].

values.name: FUNC_SIGN
values.summary: Extracts the sign of the parameter. Translates to [code]sign(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_SIN
values.summary: Returns the sine of the parameter. Translates to [code]sin(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_SINH
values.summary: Returns the hyperbolic sine of the parameter. Translates to [code]sinh(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_SQRT
values.summary: Returns the square root of the parameter. Translates to [code]sqrt(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_TAN
values.summary: Returns the tangent of the parameter. Translates to [code]tan(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_TANH
values.summary: Returns the hyperbolic tangent of the parameter. Translates to [code]tanh(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

values.name: FUNC_TRUNC
values.summary: Returns a value equal to the nearest integer to [code]x[/code] whose absolute value is not larger than the absolute value of [code]x[/code]. Translates to [code]trunc(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.

constants.summary: Returns the sine of the parameter. Translates to [code]sin(x)[/code] in the Godot Shader Language.
